name: Aboleth
organization: Solitary, brood (2–4), or slaver brood (1d3+1 plus 7–12 skum)
description_html: The cool, refreshing water suddenly erupts in a storm of reaching, grasping tentacles. The tentacles connect to a primeval fish, 20 feet in length from its bulbous head to its crescent-shaped tail. Three slit-shaped eyes, protected by bony ridges, are set one atop the other in the front of its head, which remains just beneath the surface as it attacks.

name: Achaierai
description_html: A large creature stands on four stilllike legs. It has a birdlike body, round and plump, about the size of a small pond, balanced atop its legs. Feathers that range in color from brown to red cover its body, and its terrible claws and beak glint like burnished metal.

name: Allip
description_html: The creature that floats before you is like a thing out of nightmare. It has a vaguely humanoid shape, but it’s a shape without features that has been distorted and bristles with madness. From the waist down, it trails away into vaporous nothingness, leaving a faint trace of fog behind it as it moves.

name: Ankheg
description_html: A huge segmented insect with slender legs, each ending in a sharp claw, emerges from the ground in a burst of rock and dirt. A tough chitinous brown shell covers its entire body, and glistening black eyes stare out from above powerful mandibles.

name: Ape
description_html: These powerful omnivores resemble gorillas but are far more aggressive; they kill and eat anything they can catch. An adult male ape is 5.5 to 6 feet tall and weighs 300 to 400 pounds.
description_text: These powerful omnivores resemble gorillas but are far more aggressive; they kill and eat anything they can catch. An adult male ape is 5.5 to 6 feet tall and weighs 300 to 400 pounds.

name: Ape, Dire
description_html: This great, feral ape is about the size of an ogre, but even more muscular. It is barrel-chested, with thick, black fur, long arms, and a broad muzzle. It seems well equipped with claws and teeth.

full_attack: Electricity ray +12 ranged touch (2d8) or bite +12 melee (1d8+3)
description_html: The creature has a sinuous, snakelike body with a long neck and tail. Two pairs of feathered wings extend from the body, one on the top and another on the bottom. Most of the body is covered with iridescent blue scales, with tufts of yellow feathers at the base of the neck and the tail. The head has a black, toothed beak and four eyes, one pair above the beak and the other below.

Most of the body is covered with iridescent blue scales, with tufts of yellow feathers at the base of the neck and the tail. The head has a black, toothed beak and four eyes, one pair above the beak and the other below.

attack: Electricity ray +9 ranged touch (2d8) or bite +9 melee (1d6+1)
full_attack: Electricity ray +9 ranged touch (2d8) or bite +9 melee (1d6+1)

name: Assassin Vine
description_html: This vine has a fibrous stem covered with brown, stringy bark and as thick as a human’s forearm. Its leaves are shaped like human hands.
description_text: This vine has a fibrous stem covered with brown, stringy bark and as thick as a human’s forearm. Its leaves are shaped like human hands.

name: Athach
speed: Land 35 ft, in hide armor; base 50 ft.
description_html: The creature looks like a partly giant dressed in shabby rags and furs. It has a third arm growing from its chest. Its wide, slobbering mouth has curving tusks that jut from its lower jaw. It has tiny eyes, a small nose, and lopsided ears—one huge and one tiny.
description_text: The creature looks like a partly giant dressed in shabby rags and furs. It has a third arm growing from its chest. Its wide, slobbering mouth has curving tusks that jut from its lower jaw. It has tiny eyes, a small nose, and lopsided ears—one huge and one tiny.

name: Azer
speed: Land 20 ft, in scale mail; base 30 ft.
treasure: Standard coins; double goods (nonflammables only); standard items (nonflammables only)
description_html: The creature resembles a dwarf with hair of fire and a beard of flames. It has brass-colored skin and appears to have been forged from fire and metal.
description_text: The creature resembles a dwarf with hair of fire and a beard of flames. It has brass-colored skin and appears to have been forged from fire and metal.

name: Baboon
description_html: Baboons are powerful and aggressive primates adapted to life on the ground. They prefer open spaces but climb trees to find safe places to rest overnight. A typical baboon is the size of a big dog. Males can be 2 to 4 feet long and weigh as much as 90 pounds.
description_text: Baboons are powerful and aggressive primates adapted to life on the ground. They prefer open spaces but climb trees to find safe places to rest overnight. A typical baboon is the size of a big dog. Males can be 2 to 4 feet long and weigh as much as 90 pounds.

name: Badger
description_html: The badger is a furry animal with a squat, powerful body. Its strong forelimbs are armed with long claws for digging. An adult badger is 2 to 3 feet long and weighs 25 to 35 pounds.
description_text: The badger is a furry animal with a squat, powerful body. Its strong forelimbs are armed with long claws for digging. An adult badger is 2 to 3 feet long and weighs 25 to 35 pounds.

name: Badger, Celestial
description_html:
The badger is a furry animal with a squat, powerful body. Its strong forelimbs are armed with long claws for digging. An adult badger is 2 to 3 feet long and weighs 25 to 35 pounds.

Celestial creatures dwell on the upper planes, the realms of good, although they resemble beings found on the Material Plane. They are more regal and more beautiful than their earthly counterparts.

Celestial creatures often come in metallic colors (usually silver, gold, or platinum). They can be mistaken for half-celestials, more powerful creatures that are created when a celestial mates with a noncelestial creature.

These celestial creatures are commonly summoned by the summon monster I spell.

name: Badger, Dire
description_html: This squat, muscular creature is covered in wild, thick fur. Its stout legs end in clawed feet, and its pointed snout has a wide mouth full of sharp teeth.
description_text: This squat, muscular creature is covered in wild, thick fur. Its stout legs end in clawed feet, and its pointed snout has a wide mouth full of sharp teeth.

name: Barghest
stat_line: Medium Outsider (Evil, Extraplanar, Lawful, Shapechanger) — CR 4
description_html: A horrifying wolflike monster with blue-tinged fur, long sharp claws, and a fiendish glint of intelligence in its hateful, glowing eyes darts out of the shadows.
description_text: A horrifying wolflike monster with blue-tinged fur, long sharp claws, and a fiendish glint of intelligence in its hateful, glowing eyes darts out of the shadows.

name: Barghest, Greater
stat_line: Large Outsider (Evil, Extraplanar, Lawful, Shapechanger) — CR 5

name: Basilisk
description_html: The creature looks like a thick-bodied reptile with eight legs. Rows of bony spines jut from its back, and its eyes glow with an eerie, pale green incandescence.
description_text: The creature looks like a thick-bodied reptile with eight legs. Rows of bony spines jut from its back, and its eyes glow with an eerie, pale green incandescence.

name: Basilisk, Abyssal Greater
description_html: The creature looks like a thick-bodied reptile with eight legs. Rows of bony spines jut from its back, and its eyes glow with an eerie, pale green incandescence.

name: Bat
description_html: Bats are nocturnal flying mammals. The statistics presented here describe small, insectivorous bats.
description_text: Bats are nocturnal flying mammals. The statistics presented here describe small, insectivorous bats.

name: Bat, Dire
description_html: This terrifying bat has a body as big as a horse’s and leathery wings that spread farther than a dragon’s. Shaggy fur covers most of the body, with patches of bony armor showing through here and there.
description_text: This terrifying bat has a body as big as a horse’s and leathery wings that spread farther than a dragon’s. Shaggy fur covers most of the body, with patches of bony armor showing through here and there.

name: Bear, Black
description_html: The black bear is a forest-dwelling omnivore that usually is not dangerous unless an interloper threatens its cubs or food supply. Black bears can be pure black, blond, or cinnamon in color and are rarely more than 5 feet long.
description_text: The black bear is a forest-dwelling omnivore that usually is not dangerous unless an interloper threatens its cubs or food supply. Black bears can be pure black, blond, or cinnamon in color and are rarely more than 5 feet long.

name: Bear, Brown
description_html: These massive carnivores weigh more than 1,800 pounds and stand nearly 9 feet tall when they rear up on their hind legs. They are bad-tempered and territorial. The brown bear’s statistics can be used for almost any big bear, including the grizzly.
description_text: These massive carnivores weigh more than 1,800 pounds and stand nearly 9 feet tall when they rear up on their hind legs. They are bad-tempered and territorial. The brown bear’s statistics can be used for almost any big bear, including the grizzly.

name: Bear, Dire
description_html: This hulking bear has bony brow ridges and claws like sickles, with a wildness and destructive gleam in its cold, piercing eyes.
description_text: This hulking bear has bony brow ridges and claws like sickles, with a wildness and destructive gleam in its cold, piercing eyes.

name: Bear, Polar
description_html:
These massive carnivores weigh more than 1,800 pounds and stand nearly 10 feet tall when they rear up on their hind legs. They are bad-tempered and territorial.

These long, lean carnivores are slightly taller than brown bears.
description_text:
These massive carnivores weigh more than 1,800 pounds and stand nearly 10 feet tall when they rear up on their hind legs. They are bad-tempered and territorial.
These long, lean carnivores are slightly taller than brown bears.

name: Behir
description_html: At first the creature appears as a huge armored snake, slithering across the ground at great speed. Then, without slowing, it unfolds a dozen legs from its serpentine body and runs forward to strike.
description_text: At first the creature appears as a huge armored snake, slithering across the ground at great speed. Then, without slowing, it unfolds a dozen legs from its serpentine body and runs forward to strike.

name: Beholder
attack: Eye rays +9 ranged touch and bite +7 melee (2d4)
full_attack: Eye rays +9 ranged touch and bite +7 melee (2d4)
description_html: It floats before you, a bulbous body with a central, unblinking eye, and a large maw filled with daggerlike teeth. Smaller eyes, attached to wriggling stalks, sprout from the top of the orblike body.
description_text: It floats before you, a bulbous body with a central, unblinking eye, and a large maw filled with daggerlike teeth. Smaller eyes, attached to wriggling stalks, sprout from the top of the orblike body.

name: Belker
full_attack: 2 wings +9 melee (1d6+2) and bite +4 melee (1d4+1) and 2 claws +4 melee (1d3+1)
description_html: A mass of dark smoke moves against the breeze, shifting shape as it comes closer. Cloudlike, rolling, it suddenly explodes into a demonic creature of smoke and wind, with large bat wings, clawed tendrils, and a biting maw.
description_text: A mass of dark smoke moves against the breeze, shifting shape as it comes closer. Cloudlike, rolling, it suddenly explodes into a demonic creature of smoke and wind, with large bat wings, clawed tendrils, and a biting maw.

name: Bison
description_html: These herd animals can be aggressive when protecting young and during the mating season, but they generally prefer flight to fighting. A bison stands more than 6 feet tall at the shoulder and is 9 to 12 feet long. It weigh 1,800 to 2,400 pounds. The bison’s statistics can be used for almost any large herd animal.

name: Black Dragon, Adult
full_attack: Bite +24 melee (2d6+6), 2 claws +19 melee (1d8+3), 2 wings +19 melee (1d6+3), Tail Slap +19 melee (1d8+9)
organization: solitary, pair, or family (1–2 and 2–5 offspring)
description_html: The dragon’s head looks decidedly like a skull thanks to its deep-socketed eyes and wide, flat nasal opening. It has forward-curving horns and a spinal crest that peaks just behind the head and tapers off about three quarters of the way down the neck. An acidic smell surrounds the dragon, whose scales are mostly dull ebony and dark gray.

attack: Slam +14 melee Full Attack: 2 slams +14 melee
description_html:
Blightspawned Treant* (CR 9)

Huge Plant
Alignment: Always neutral evil
Initiative: -1 (Dex); Senses: Listen +7 and Spot +7

AC: 20 (-2 size, -1 Dex, +13 natural), touch 7, flat-footed 20
Hit Dice: 7d8+42 (73 hp); DR: 10/slashing
Fort +11, Ref +1, Will +6
Speed: 30 ft.
Space: 15 ft./15 ft.
Base Attack +5; Grapple +24
Attack: Slam +14 melee
Full Attack: 2 slams +14 melee
Damage: Slam 2d6+11

Organization: Gang (2-5)
Treasure/Possessions: None

name: Boar
description_html: Though not carnivores, these wild swine are bad-tempered and usually charge anyone who disturbs them. A boar is covered in coarse, grayish-black fur. Adult males are about 4 feet long and 3 feet high at the shoulder.
description_text: Though not carnivores, these wild swine are bad-tempered and usually charge anyone who disturbs them. A boar is covered in coarse, grayish-black fur. Adult males are about 4 feet long and 3 feet high at the shoulder.

name: Boar, Dire
description_html: This giant boar has an arched back as high as a human is tall. It has spiny armor on its head and back, great, gleaming tusks, and small, furious, demon eyes.
description_text: This giant boar has an arched back as high as a human is tall. It has spiny armor on its head and back, great, gleaming tusks, and small, furious, demon eyes.

name: Bodak
description_html: This creature is a gray-fleshed, hairless humanoid with an elongated skull-like head, noseless face, and white, empty eyes.
description_text: This creature is a gray-fleshed, hairless humanoid with an elongated skull-like head, noseless face, and white, empty eyes.

name: Bodak Five-Headed Hydra
attack: bite +4 melee Full Attack: 5 bites +4 melee
description_html:
Bodak Five-Headed Hydra* (CR 8)

Huge Undead
Alignment: Always chaotic evil
Initiative: +3 (Dex); Senses: scent, Listen +5, and Spot +5

AC: 20 (-2 size, +3 Dex, +9 natural), touch 11, flat-footed 17
Hit Dice: 5d12 (35 hp); DR: 10/cold iron
Fort +4, Ref +7, Will +3
Speed: 10 ft., swim 10 ft.
Space: 15 ft./10 ft.
Base Attack +2; Grapple +14
Attack: bite +4 melee
Full Attack: 5 bites +4 melee
Damage: Bite 1d10+4
Special Attacks/Actions: Death gaze
Abilities: Str 19, Dex 16, Con -, Int 1, Wis 12, Cha 11
Special Qualities: Acid resistance 10, electricity immunity, fast healing 15, fire resistance 20, flashbacks, sunlight vulnerability, undead traits
Feats: Combat Reflexes; Iron Will; Toughness
Skills: Listen +5, Spot +5, and Swim +12
Advancement: -
Climate/Terrain: Any
Organization: Solitary or gang (2-4)
Treasure/Possessions: 1/10 coins; 50% goods; 50% items

name: Brass Dragon, Adult
full_attack: Bite +24 melee (2d6+6), 2 Claws +19 melee (1d8+3), 2 Wings +19 melee (1d6+3), Tail Slap +19 melee (1d8+9)

name: Bronze Dragon, Adult
full_attack: Bite +27 melee (2d8+8), 2 Claws +22 melee (2d6+4), 2 Wings +22 melee (1d8+4), Tail Slap +22 melee (2d6+12)
organization: solitary, pair, or family (1−2 and 2−5 offspring)
description_html: The dragon has a ribbed and fluted crest sweeping back from its cheeks and eyes. The ribs in the crests end in curving horns. The dragon also has small horns on its lower jaw and chin. It has a beaklike snout and a small head frill, as well as a tall neck frill. The scent of the sea surrounds the dragon, and its scales have a metallic, golden brown cast.

The dragon also has small horns on its lower jaw and chin. It has a beaklike snout and a small head frill, as well as a tall neck frill. The scent of the sea surrounds the dragon, and its scales have a metallic, golden brown cast.

name: Bugbear
organization: Solitary, gang (2–4), or band (11–20 plus 150% noncombatants plus 2 3rd−level sergeants and 1 leader of 2nd–5th level)
description_html: This muscular, savage humanoid stands 7 feet tall. Coarse hair covers most of its body. Its mouth is full of long, sharp fangs, and its nose is much like that of a bear.
description_text: This muscular, savage humanoid stands 7 feet tall. Coarse hair covers most of its body. Its mouth is full of long, sharp fangs, and its nose is much like that of a bear.

name: Bulette
description_html: The ground shakes and rolls and then bursts open to reveal a terrible, armor-plated, bullet-shaped creature with a huge snapping maw and short, powerful legs.
description_text: The ground shakes and rolls and then bursts open to reveal a terrible, armor-plated, bullet-shaped creature with a huge snapping maw and short, powerful legs.

name: Camel
description_html:
Camels are known for their ability to travel long distances without food or water. The statistics presented here are for the dromedary, or one-humped camel, which thrives in warm deserts. A dromedary stands about 7 feet tall at the shoulder, with its hump rising 1 foot higher. The two-humped, or Bactrian, camel is suited to cooler, rocky areas. It is stockier, slower (speed 40 feet), and has a higher Constitution score (16).

Carrying Capacity: A light load for a camel is up to 300 pounds; a medium load, 301–600 pounds; and a heavy load, 601–900 pounds. A camel can drag 4,500 pounds.

description_html: The creature gallops out of the trees, its thundering hooves echoing throughout the forest. It has the upper torso, arms, and head of a humanoid, and the lower body of a large horse. It carries a longbow, drawn and nocked, ready to loose an arrow at the first hint of danger.
description_text: The creature gallops out of the trees, its thundering hooves echoing throughout the forest. It has the upper torso, arms, and head of a humanoid, and the lower body of a large horse. It carries a longbow, drawn and nocked, ready to loose an arrow at the first hint of danger.

name: Chaos Beast
description_html: Foul and terrible, the creature before you has no set form. It constantly melts and reforms, apparently drawing each shape from every nightmare that has ever plagued humankind. It chaotically shifts through a dozen monstrous forms before shaping itself into a bulbous thing with ten eyes swimming in a viscous sac at the top of a body that’s surrounded by a ring of smacking mouths.

description_html: This creature has the hindquarters of a big goat and the forequarters of a great lion. It has dragon wings and three heads: a horned goat, a maneless lion, and a fierce dragon.

name: Choker
description_html: A creature perches in the shadows, near the ceiling, in a corner of the chamber. Its body resembles that of a naked halfling with mottled flesh, but its limbs are incredibly spindly and long. It hisses, showing sharp, large teeth an instant before one of its limbs snaps out like a whip.

It hisses, showing sharp, large teeth an instant before one of its limbs snaps out like a whip.

name: Chuul
description_html: Like some large insect or monstrous crustacean, the creature rises from the still pool, its pincerlike claws snapping angrily as torchlight reflects off its mottled, armored canapace. Its small dark eyes fix you with a hungry stare, and the tentacles dripping from its mouth squirm excitedly as it emerges from the water.
description_text: Like some large insect or monstrous crustacean, the creature rises from the still pool, its pincerlike claws snapping angrily as torchlight reflects off its mottled, armored canapace. name: Cloaker
full_attack: Tail slap +8 melee (1d6+5) and bite +3 melee (1d4+2)
description_html: A long black cloak hangs from the cave wall. Suddenly, the cloak slips from the wall and catches a breeze moving through the cavern. Then it unfolds, the cloak becoming dark wings and a bony, whiplike tail unfurling to stretch out behind it. It flies forward, revealing a toothy maw and piercing red eyes deep in the shadows of its raylike body.

attack: Gargantuan morningstar +22 melee (4d6+18) or slam +22 melee (1d6+12) or rock +12 ranged (2d8+12)

treasure: Standard coins, double goods; standard items
description_html: This giant has a muscular humanoid build and handsome, well-defined features. Its skin is milky white tinged with blue, and it has silvery white hair.
description_text: This giant has a muscular humanoid build and handsome, well-defined features. Its skin is milky white tinged with blue, and it has silvery white hair.

name: Cockatrice
description_html: This avian creature is about the size of a large goose or turkey. It has the head and body of a cockarel, bat wings, and the long tail of a lizard. Its eyes glow with a dangerous-looking crimson sheen.
description_text: This avian creature is about the size of a large goose or turkey. It has the head and body of a cockarel, bat wings, and the long tail of a lizard. Its eyes glow with a dangerous-looking crimson sheen.

name: Copper Dragon, Adult
full_attack: Bite +25 melee (2d6+6), 2 Claws +20 melee (1d8+3), 2 Wings +20 melee (1d6+3), Tail Slap +20 melee (1d8+9)
organization: solitary, pair, or family (1−2 and 2−5 offspring)
description_html: The dragon has massive thighs and shoulders, with a short face and broad, smooth brow plates jutting over the eyes. Long, flat horns extend back from the brow plates in a series of overlapping segments. The dragon also has backswept cheek ridges and frills on the backs of the lower jaws that sweep forward slightly. Layers of triangular blades point down from the chin. The dragon has an acrid odor, and its reddish scales have a metallic shine.

description_html: This great serpent with rainbow-feathered wings appears confident, powerful, and totally aware of everything around it.
description_text: This great serpent with rainbow-feathered wings appears confident, powerful, and totally aware of everything around it.

name: Crocodile
attack: Bite +6 melee (1d8+6) or tail slap +6 melee (1d12+6)
full_attack: Bite +6 melee (1d8+6) or tail slap +6 melee (1d12+6)
description_html: Crocodiles are aggressive predators 11 to 12 feet long. They lie mostly submerged in rivers or marshes, with only their eyes and nostrils showing, waiting for prey to come within reach.
description_text: Crocodiles are aggressive predators 11 to 12 feet long. They lie mostly submerged in rivers or marshes, with only their eyes and nostrils showing, waiting for prey to come within reach.

description_html: These huge creatures usually live in salt water and can be more than 20 feet long. Giant crocodiles fight and behave like their smaller cousins.
description_text: These huge creatures usually live in salt water and can be more than 20 feet long. Giant crocodiles fight and behave like their smaller cousins.

name: Delver
description_html: A huge creature burrows through the solid rock wall. Its teardrop-shaped, rocky body glistens with slime, and it uses the blunt claws of its two great appendages to clear away the debris.
description_text: A huge creature burrows through the solid rock wall. Its teardrop-shaped, rocky body glistens with slime, and it uses the blunt claws of its two great appendages to clear away the debris.

name: Demon, Babau
stat_line: Medium Outsider (Chaotic, Extraplanar, Evil, Tanar’ri) — CR 6
description_html: Reeking of decay, this gaunt humanoid is covered in black, leathery skin. Behind its pointed ears, a large curved horn rises out of the back of its skull. A mouth of jagged teeth takes up half of the foul creature’s head.
description_text: Reeking of decay, this gaunt humanoid is covered in black, leathery skin. Behind its pointed ears, a large curved horn rises out of the back of its skull. A mouth of jagged teeth takes up half of the foul creature’s head.

name: Demon, Balor
full_attack: +1 vorpal longsword +31/+26/+21/+16 melee (2d6+8/19-20) and +1 flaming whip +30/+25 melee (1d4+4 plus 1d6 fire plus entangle), or 2 slams +31 melee (1d10+7)
organization: Solitary or troupe (1 balor, 1 marilith, and 2–5 hezrous)
treasure: Standard coins; double goods; standard items, plus +1 vorpal greatsword and +1 flaming whip
stat_line: Large Outsider (Chaotic, Extraplanar, Evil, Tanar’ri) — CR 20
description_html: A dark aura of power surrounds this towering humanoid with huge bat wings. Lurid flames dance over its skin. In one of its massive clawed hands, this creature bears a sword that looks sharp enough to cut even to the soul. In its other hand, it bears a whip licked by tongues of fire.
description_text: A dark aura of power surrounds this towering humanoid with huge bat wings. Lurid flames dance over its skin. name: Demon, Bebilith
attack: Bite +19 melee (2d6+9 plus poison) or web +11 ranged
full_attack: Bite +19 melee (2d6+9 plus poison) and 2 claws +14 melee (2d4+4); or web +11 ranged
description_html: An enormous, misshapen spider stalks out of the darkness. Its forelegs end in wicked barbs, and globs of foul goo drip from its fanged mouth.
description_text: An enormous, misshapen spider stalks out of the darkness. Its forelegs end in wicked barbs, and globs of foul goo drip from its fanged mouth.

name: Demon, Dretch
organization: Solitary, pair, gang (3–5), crowd (6–15), or mob (10–40)
stat_line: Small Outsider (Chaotic, Extraplanar, Evil, Tanar’ri) — CR 2
description_html: This humanoid-looking creature has a squat and blubbery, almost hairless body, with pale, sickly flesh and a slack mouth full of small fangs.
description_text: This humanoid-looking creature has a squat and blubbery, almost hairless body, with pale, sickly flesh and a slack mouth full of small fangs.

name: Demon, Glabrezu
full_attack: 2 pincers +20 melee (2d8+10) and 2 claws +18 melee (1d6+5) and bite +18 melee (1d8+5)
organization: Solitary or troupe (1 glabrezu, 1 succubus, and 2–5 vrocks)
treasure: Standard coins; double goods; standard items
stat_line: Huge Outsider (Chaotic, Extraplanar, Evil, Tanar’ri) — CR 13
description_html: This creature is as tall as a giant, with a broad, muscular body. Its four arms end in weapons—two with clawed hands, two with powerful pincers its doglike head is topped with horns, and its muzzle drips with sharp fangs. Its eyes have a cold, dark, penetrating quality that suggests cunning and intelligence.

name: Demon, Hezrou
stat_line: Large Outsider (Chaotic, Extraplanar, Evil, Tanar’ri) — CR 11
description_html: This creature looks like a massive, roughly humanoid toad with arms in place of forelegs. Its wide mouth has rows of blunt, powerful teeth, and long spines run down the length of its back.

description_html: This large, otherworldly entity appears to be an attractive female human with six arms—at least from her head to her waist. From the waist down, the creature has the body of a massive snake with green, scaly coils.

organization: Solitary or troupe (1 nalfeshnee, 1 hezrou, and 2–5 vrocks)
treasure: Standard coins; double goods; standard items
stat_line: Huge Outsider (Chaotic, Extraplanar, Evil, Tanar’ri) — CR 14
description_html: This creature is a grotesque blending of an ape and a corpulent boar. It stands on its hind legs, rising to more than three times the height of a human. It has a pair of feathered wings that seem ridiculously small compared to the rest of its body.
description_text: This creature is a grotesque blending of an ape and a corpulent boar. It stands on its hind legs, rising to more than three times the height of a human. It has a pair of feathered wings that seem ridiculously small compared to the rest of its body.

description_html: A tiny humanoid-shaped creature with spiky horns and bat wings hovers nearby. Its hands and feet are long and slender, with long, claw-tipped digits. Warts or pustules cover its greenish skin.
description_text: A tiny humanoid-shaped creature with spiky horns and bat wings hovers nearby. Its hands and feet are long and slender, with long, claw-tipped digits. Warts or pustules cover its greenish skin.

description_html: This creature looks like an enormous spider, standing twice as tall as a human. Its forelegs end in massive cleavers. Four bulbous eyes, a malevo- lent gleam in each one, rise out of its carapace.
description_text: This creature looks like an enormous spider, standing twice as tall as a human. Its forelegs end in massive cleavers. Four bulbous eyes, a malevo- lent gleam in each one, rise out of its carapace.

name: Demon, Succubus
stat_line: Medium Outsider (Chaotic, Extraplanar, Evil, Tanar’ri) — CR 7
description_html: This creature is stunning, statuesque, and extraordinarily beautiful, with flawless skin and raven hair. Her form, so tempting, also has an other-worldly side. Large but wings unfurl from her back, and her eyes glow with sinister desire.
description_text: This creature is stunning, statuesque, and extraordinarily beautiful, with flawless skin and raven hair. Her form, so tempting, also has an other-worldly side. Large but wings unfurl from her back, and her eyes glow with sinister desire.

description_html: A small, stocky dwarflike creature in studded leather armor titters and mumbles to himself. His skin is a pale blue-white color, and his bulbous white eyes have no irises or pupils. His hair is coarse and white, and a long mustache droops past his chin.
description_text: A small, stocky dwarflike creature in studded leather armor titters and mumbles to himself. His skin is a pale blue-white color, and his bulbous white eyes have no irises or pupils. His hair is coarse and white, and a long mustache droops past his chin.

name: Destrachan
description_html: The creature shambles forward on thick, taloned legs. Vaguely reptilian in form, its large, stooped frame ends in a mostly featureless head dominated by large ear structures and a gaping, toothless mouth.
description_text: The creature shambles forward on thick, taloned legs. Vaguely reptilian in form, its large, stooped frame ends in a mostly featureless head dominated by large ear structures and a gaping, toothless mouth.

name: Devil, Barbed Devil (Hamatula)
stat_line: Medium Outsider (Baatezu, Evil, Extraplanar, Lawful) — CR 11
description_html: This creature looks like a tall humanoid covered with sharp barbs, right down to the tip of its long, meaty tail. Its eyes shift and dart about, making it appear agitated or nervous.
description_text: This creature looks like a tall humanoid covered with sharp barbs, right down to the tip of its long, meaty tail. Its eyes shift and dart about, making it appear agitated or nervous.

name: Devil, Bearded Devil (Barbazu)
attack: Glaive +9 melee (1d10+3 plus infernal wound) or claw +8 melee (1d6+2)
full_attack: Glaive +9/4 melee (1d10+3 plus infernal wound) or 2 claws +8 melee (1d6+2)
stat_line: Medium Outsider (Baatezu, Evil, Extraplanar, Lawful) — CR 5
description_html: The first thing that stands out about this creature is the massive saw-toothed glaive it carries. The creature’s pointed ears and moist, scaly skin mark it as an outsider. It has a long tail, clawed hands and feet, and a snaky, disgusting beard.

name: Devil, Bone Devil (Osyluth)
full_attack: Bite +14 melee (1d8+5) and 2 claws +12 melee (1d4+2) and sting +12 melee (3d4+2 plus poison)
stat_line: Large Outsider (Baatezu, Evil, Extraplanar, Lawful) — CR 9
description_html: This tall creature looks skeletal and wretched, almost a husk of a humanoid form, with dried skin stretched so tight as to outline and emphasize every bone. It has a fearsome, skull-like head and a tail like a scorpion’s, and a foul odor of decay hangs in the air around it.
description_text: This tall creature looks skeletal and wretched, almost a husk of a humanoid form, with dried skin stretched so tight as to outline and emphasize every bone. It has a fearsome, skull-like head and a tail like a scorpion’s, and a foul odor of decay hangs in the air around it.

name: Devil, Chain Devil (Kyton)
description_html: The clank and rattle of chains announces the arrival of this creature. It appears human in shape and size, but chains wrap it like a shroud, every length ending in a hook or a blade or a heavy ball. The chains seems to slither and slide over the creature’s form, almost as if they were alive.

description_html: Silently, with grace and power, a creature emerges on the path ahead. It has the shape of an enormous lion, but its form consists of blinding light and fiery sparks, as though its body were made of energy and not flesh and bone.

description_html: Cloaked in fire and as tall as two humans, this hulking monster spreads its batlike wings and cracks its whiplike tail. Great scales cover its body like armor. It smiles, revealing large fangs that drip with a hissing venom.

name: Dog, Celestial
description_html:
The statistics presented here describe a fairly small dog of about 20 to 50 pounds in weight. They also can be used for small wild canines such as coyotes, jackals, and African wild dogs.

Celestial creatures dwell on the upper planes, the realms of good, although they resemble beings found on the Material Plane. They are more regal and more beautiful than their earthly counterparts.

Celestial creatures often come in metallic colors (usually silver, gold, or platinum). They can be mistaken for half-celestials, more powerful creatures that are created when a celestial mates with a noncelestial creature.

These celestial creatures are commonly summoned by the summon monster I spell.

Celestial creatures often come in metallic colors (usually silver, gold, or platinum). They can be mistaken for half-celestials, more powerful creatures that are created when a celestial mates with a noncelestial creature.
These celestial creatures are commonly summoned by the
summon monster I
spell.

name: Dog, Riding
description_html:
This category includes working breeds such as collies, huskies, and St. Bernards.

Carrying Capacity: A light load for a riding dog is up to 100 pounds; a medium load, 101–200 pounds; and a heavy load, 201–300 pounds. A riding dog can drag 1,500 pounds.
description_text:
This category includes working breeds such as collies, huskies, and St. Bernards.
Carrying Capacity:
A light load for a riding dog is up to 100 pounds; a medium load, 101–200 pounds; and a heavy load, 201–300 pounds. A riding dog can drag 1,500 pounds.

name: Donkey
description_html:
These long-eared, horselike creatures are surefooted and sturdy. The statistics presented here could also describe burros.

Carrying Capacity: A light load for a donkey is up to 50 pounds; a medium load, 51–100 pounds; and a heavy load, 101–150 pounds. A donkey can drag 750 pounds.
description_text:

name: Doppelganger
description_html: This gaunt, gray-skinned humanoid has long, gangly limbs and a bulbous head with large, octopoid eyes. Its face is otherwise blank and featureless.
description_text: This gaunt, gray-skinned humanoid has long, gangly limbs and a bulbous head with large, octopoid eyes. Its face is otherwise blank and featureless.

name: Dragon Turtle
description_html: This huge creature has a wide, streamlined shell with jagged protrusions. A long neck emerges from one end of the shell, ending in a crested head with sharp-lined jaws. Taloned flippers extend from holes along the sides of the shell, and a long tail snakes from the rear of the shell.

name: Eagle
description_html: These birds of prey inhabit nearly every terrain and climate, though they all prefer high, secluded nesting spots. A typical eagle is about 3 feet long and has a wingspan of about 7 feet. The statistics presented here can describe any similar-sized, diurnal bird of prey.
description_text: These birds of prey inhabit nearly every terrain and climate, though they all prefer high, secluded nesting spots. A typical eagle is about 3 feet long and has a wingspan of about 7 feet. The statistics presented here can describe any similar-sized, diurnal bird of prey.

name: Eagle, Giant
description_html: Giant eagles are intelligent, keen-eyed birds of prey that sometimes associate with good creatures. Giant eagles attack creatures that appear threatening, especially those intent on raiding the eagles’ nest for eggs or fledglings, which fetch a handsome price in many civilized areas. Young eagles can be trained and are prized as aerial mounts. A typical giant eagle stands about 10 feet tall, has a wingspan of up to 20 feet, and resembles its smaller cousins in nearly every way except size. It weighs about 500 pounds.

name: Elephant
full_attack: Slam +16 melee (2d6+10) and 2 stamps +11 melee (2d6+5), or gore +16 melee (2d8+15)
description_html:
Massive herbivores of tropical lands, elephants are unpredictable creatures but nevertheless are sometimes used as mounts or beasts of burden.

This entry describes an African elephant. Indian elephants are slightly smaller and weaker (Strength 28), but more readily trained (Wisdom 15). These statistics can also represent prehistoric creatures such as mammoths and mastodons.

description_html: This humanoid, slender and slightly shorter than a human, has pale skin and dark hair. Pointed ears grace the sides of its elongated head. It wears armor with a natural, forest-themed design that appears organic instead of worked and crafted.

name: Ethereal Filcher
treasure: No coins; standard goods; double items
description_html: This bizarre creature stands nearly as tall as a human, but that’s where the similarity ends. It has a baglike body that balances on a single, powerful leg that ends in a prehensile foot. Its face is located in the center of its body, with four eyes and a large mouth. Four long, multi-jointed arms extend from the body, each ending in long, slender fingers.

name: Ethereal Marauder
description_html: This creature resembles a bipedal lizard with a sinuous tail. Its most disturbing feature is its lack of a head. Instead it has a gaping maw surrounded by three powerful mandibles; gleaming, jet-black teeth line the inner mouth. Three small eyes ring the maw, interspersed with the mandibles.

name: Giant Ant, Queen
description_html: Giant ants are among the hardiest and most adaptable vermin. Queens can grow to a length of 9 feet.
description_text: Giant ants are among the hardiest and most adaptable vermin. Queens can grow to a length of 9 feet.

name: Giant Ant, Soldier
description_html: Giant ants are among the hardiest and most adaptable vermin. Soldiers are about 6 feet long.
description_text: Giant ants are among the hardiest and most adaptable vermin. Soldiers are about 6 feet long.

name: Giant Ant, Worker
organization: Gang (2–6) or crew (6–11 plus 1 giant ant soldier)
description_html: Giant ants are among the hardiest and most adaptable vermin. Soldiers and workers are about 6 feet long.
description_text: Giant ants are among the hardiest and most adaptable vermin. Soldiers and workers are about 6 feet long.

name: Giant Bee
treasure: No coins; 1/4 goods (honey only); no items
description_html: Although many times larger, growing to a length of about 5 feet, giant bees behave generally the same as their smaller cousins.
description_text: Although many times larger, growing to a length of about 5 feet, giant bees behave generally the same as their smaller cousins.

name: Giant Bombardier Beetle
description_html: These creatures feed primarily on carrion and offal, gathering heaps of the stuff in which to build nests and lay eggs. A giant bombardier beetle is about 6 feet long.
description_text: These creatures feed primarily on carrion and offal, gathering heaps of the stuff in which to build nests and lay eggs. A giant bombardier beetle is about 6 feet long.

name: Giant Fire Beetle
description_html: These luminous nocturnal insects are prized by miners and adventurers. They have two glands, one above each eye, that produce a red glow. The glands’ luminosity persists for 1d days after removal from the beetle, illuminating a roughly circular area with a 10-foot radius. Giant fire beetles are about 2 feet long.
description_text: These luminous nocturnal insects are prized by miners and adventurers. They have two glands, one above each eye, that produce a red glow. The glands’ luminosity persists for 1d days after removal from the beetle, illuminating a roughly circular area with a 10-foot radius. Giant fire beetles are about 2 feet long.

name: Giant Fire Beetle, Celestial
description_html:
These luminous nocturnal insects are prized by miners and adventurers. They have two glands, one above each eye, that produce a red glow. The glands’ luminosity persists for 1d days after removal from the beetle, illuminating a roughly circular area with a 10-foot radius. Giant fire beetles are about 2 feet long.

Celestial creatures dwell on the upper planes, the realms of good, although they resemble beings found on the Material Plane. They are more regal and more beautiful than their earthly counterparts.

Celestial creatures often come in metallic colors (usually silver, gold, or platinum). They can be mistaken for half-celestials, more powerful creatures that are created when a celestial mates with a noncelestial creature.

These celestial creatures are commonly summoned by the summon monster I spell.

The glands’ luminosity persists for 1d days after removal from the beetle, illuminating a roughly circular area with a 10-foot radius. Giant fire beetles are about 2 feet long.
Celestial creatures dwell on the upper planes, the realms of good, although they resemble beings found on the Material Plane. They are more regal and more beautiful than their earthly counterparts.

spell.

name: Giant Praying Mantis
description_html: This patient carnivore remains completely still as it waits for prey to come near.
description_text: This patient carnivore remains completely still as it waits for prey to come near.

name: Giant Stag Beetle
description_html: These creatures are serious pests that greedily devour cultivated crops. A single beetle can strip an entire farm in short order. An adult giant stag beetle is about 10 feet long.
description_text: These creatures are serious pests that greedily devour cultivated crops. A single beetle can strip an entire farm in short order. An adult giant stag beetle is about 10 feet long.

name: Giant Wasp
description_html: Giant wasps attack when hungry or threatened, stinging their prey to death. They take dead or incapacitated opponents back to their lairs as food for their unhatched young.
description_text: Giant wasps attack when hungry or threatened, stinging their prey to death. They take dead or incapacitated opponents back to their lairs as food for their unhatched young.

name: Gibbering Mouther
attack: Bite +4 melee (1) or spittle +4 ranged touch (1d4 and plus blindness)
full_attack: 6 bites +4 melee (1) and spittle +4 ranged touch (1d4 and plus blindness)
description_html: This unwholesome creature has a body with the form and fluidity of an amoeba. Its surface has the color, but not the consistency of human flesh. Countless eyes and toothy mouths constantly form and disappear all over the creature, often retreating into its body even as they become apparent.
description_text: This unwholesome creature has a body with the form and fluidity of an amoeba. Its surface has the color, but not the consistency of human flesh. Countless eyes and toothy mouths constantly form and disappear all over the creature, often retreating into its body even as they become apparent.

name: Girallon
description_html: At first glance, this creature looks like an albino gorilla, but it has four arms. It also has razor-sharp teeth and long claws.
description_text: At first glance, this creature looks like an albino gorilla, but it has four arms. It also has razor-sharp teeth and long claws.

name: Githyanki, 1st-Level Warrior

name: Gold Dragon, Adult
full_attack: Bite +32 melee (2d8+11), 2 Claws +27 melee (2d6+5), 2 Wings +27 melee (1d8+5), Tail Slap +27 melee (2d6+16)
organization: solitary, pair, or family (1−2 and 2−5 offspring)
description_html: The dragon has large, smooth, twin horns that sweep back from its nose and brow. Twin frills adorn its long neck, and whiskers around its mouth look like the barbels of a catfish. Its saillike wings start at its shoulders and trace down to the tip of its tail. The dragon smells of saffron and incense, and its scales glisten like polished gold.

name: Golden Protector (Celestial Half-Dragon Lammasu)
description_html: This creature has the body of a lion covered with scales similar to those of a golden dragon, the wings of a dragon, and the face of a human.
description_text: This creature has the body of a lion covered with scales similar to those of a golden dragon, the wings of a dragon, and the face of a human.

name: Golem, Clay
description_html: This automaton has been sculpted from soft clay. It’s about 18 inches taller than a normal human, and its features are grossly distorted from the human norm. Its chest is overly large, with arms attached by thick knots of muscle at the shoulder, hanging down to its knees, and ending in short, stubby fingers. It has no neck, and the large head has broad, flat features. Its legs are short and bowed, ending in wide, flat feet. It smells faintly of clay.
description_text: This automaton has been sculpted from soft clay. It’s about 18 inches taller than a normal human, and its features are grossly distorted from the human norm. Its chest is overly large, with arms attached by thick knots of muscle at the shoulder, hanging down to its knees, and ending in short, stubby fingers. It has no neck, and the large head has broad, flat features. Its legs are short and bowed, ending in wide, flat feet. It smells faintly of clay.

name: Golem, Flesh
description_html: This automaton looks as though it was constructed from a grisly assortment of decaying human body parts, stitched and bolted together into a form taller than a living man. It smells faintly of freshly dug earth and dead flesh.
description_text: This automaton looks as though it was constructed from a grisly assortment of decaying human body parts, stitched and bolted together into a form taller than a living man. It smells faintly of freshly dug earth and dead flesh.

name: Golem, Iron
description_html: This metallic automaton is twice the height of a normal human and resembles an armored giant.
description_text: This metallic automaton is twice the height of a normal human and resembles an armored giant.

name: Golem, Stone
description_html: This automaton has been cut from stone. It is half again as tall as a normal human and resembles a roughly chiseled statue of a soldier.
description_text: This automaton has been cut from stone. It is half again as tall as a normal human and resembles a roughly chiseled statue of a soldier.

name: Golem, Stone, Greater
description_html: This automaton has been cut from stone. It is 18 feet tall and resembles a roughly chiseled statue of a soldier.

name: Gorgon
description_html: Dusky, metallic scales cover this creature’s bull-like body. It has silver horns.

name: Gray Ooze
description_html: What seemed to be just a puddle of water is in fact a slimy horror that moves and flows like some giant protozoan.
description_text: What seemed to be just a puddle of water is in fact a slimy horror that moves and flows like some giant protozoan.

name: Gray Render
description_html: This hulking biped has the mass of a giant. It has a stooped frame, a gray, hairless body, and broad shoulders. Its arms are long and sinewy, and its clawed hands scrape along the ground as it walks. Its sloped forehead bears six small, yellowish eyes. Its mouth is wide and powerful-looking, filled with black teeth.
description_text: This hulking biped has the mass of a giant. It has a stooped frame, a gray, hairless body, and broad shoulders. Its arms are long and sinewy, and its clawed hands scrape along the ground as it walks. Its sloped forehead bears six small, yellowish eyes. Its mouth is wide and powerful-looking, filled with black teeth.

name: Green Dragon, Adult
full_attack: Bite +26 melee (2d8+8), 2 Claws +21 melee (2d6+4), 2 Wings +21 melee (1d8+4), Tail Slap +21 melee (2d6+12)
organization: solitary, pair, or family (1−2 and 2−5 offspring)
description_html: The dragon has a toothy, curving jaw line and rows of hornlets over its eyes. There is a cluster of hornlets at the chin. A crest begins just behind the eyes and runs the length of the body, rising to full height just behind the skull. The odor of chlorine clings to the dragon, whose scales radiate with a glowing emerald shine.

treasure: No coins; double goods; standard items
description_html: This creature has the body of a tall, muscular human, but with long, powerful wings instead of arms. The face is more human than avian, but the hair resembles a feathery cowl, and the eyes are bright gold. The legs have strong talons and feathery vanes.
description_text: This creature has the body of a tall, muscular human, but with long, powerful wings instead of arms. The face is more human than avian, but the hair resembles a feathery cowl, and the eyes are bright gold. The legs have strong talons and feathery vanes.

name: Guardinal, Leonal
treasure: No coins; double goods; standard items
description_html: This creature looks like a powerful humanoid about 6 feet tall, covered in short, golden fur. Its head is leonine in appearance, with a short muzzle and a lush, dark gold mane. Its arms end in powerful claws, and its mouth holds rows of long, sharp teeth.
description_text: This creature looks like a powerful humanoid about 6 feet tall, covered in short, golden fur. Its head is leonine in appearance, with a short muzzle and a lush, dark gold mane. Its arms end in powerful claws, and its mouth holds rows of long, sharp teeth.

name: Hag, Annis
organization: Solitary or covey (3 hags of any kind plus 1–8 ogres and 1–4 evil giants)
description_html: This creature looks like an ancient female human, but impossibly tall. It has deep blue skin and filthy black hair.
description_text: This creature looks like an ancient female human, but impossibly tall. It has deep blue skin and filthy black hair.

name: Hag, Green
organization: Solitary or covey (3 hags of any kind plus 1–8 ogres and 1–4 evil giants)
description_html: This creature looks like a very old female human. It has a sickly green complexion with dark, tangled hair that looks almost like a twisted vine.
description_text: This creature looks like a very old female human. It has a sickly green complexion with dark, tangled hair that looks almost like a twisted vine.

name: Hag, Night
organization: Solitary, mounted (1, on nightmare), or covey (3, on nightmares)
description_html: This being looks like a hideously ugly human woman. Its flesh is the blue-violet of a deep bruise and covered with warts, blisters, and open sores. It has straggly jet-black hair and jagged, yellow teeth. The eyes burn like hot coals, throwing out a thick, red radiance.
description_text: This being looks like a hideously ugly human woman. Its flesh is the blue-violet of a deep bruise and covered with warts, blisters, and open sores. It has straggly jet-black hair and jagged, yellow teeth. The eyes burn like hot coals, throwing out a thick, red radiance.

name: Hag, Sea
organization: Solitary or covey (3 hags of any kind plus 1–8 ogres and 1–4 evil giants)
description_html: This creature looks like an old female human. Its flesh is sickly and yellow, covered with warts and oozing sores. Its long, filthy hair resembles rotting seaweed.
description_text: This creature looks like an old female human. Its flesh is sickly and yellow, covered with warts and oozing sores. Its long, filthy hair resembles rotting seaweed.

name: Horse, Heavy
description_html:
Horses are widely domesticated for riding and as beasts of burden.

The statistics presented here describe large breeds of working horses such as Clydesdales. These animals are usually ready for heavy work by age three. A heavy horse cannot fight while carrying a rider.

Carrying Capacity: A light load for a heavy horse is up to 200 pounds; a medium load, 201–400 pounds; and a heavy load, 401–600 pounds. A heavy horse can drag 3,000 pounds.
description_text:
Horses are widely domesticated for riding and as beasts of burden.
The statistics presented here describe large breeds of working horses such as Clydesdales. These animals are usually ready for heavy work by age three. A heavy horse cannot fight while carrying a rider.
Carrying Capacity:
A light load for a heavy horse is up to 200 pounds; a medium load, 201–400 pounds; and a heavy load, 401–600 pounds. A heavy horse can drag 3,000 pounds.

name: Horse, Light
description_html:
Horses are widely domesticated for riding and as beasts of burden.

The statistics presented here describe smaller breeds of working horses such as quarter horses and Arabians as well as wild horses. These animals are usually ready for useful work by age two. A light horse cannot fight while carrying a rider.

Carrying Capacity: A light load for a light horse is up to 150 pounds; a medium load, 151–300 pounds; and a heavy load, 301–450 pounds. A light horse can drag 2,250 pounds.

name: Invisible Stalker
description_html:
Invisible stalkers are creatures native to the Elemental Plane of Air. They sometimes serve wizards and sorcerers, who summon them to perform specific tasks.

A summoned invisible stalker undertakes whatever task the summoner commands, even if the task sends it hundreds or thousands of miles away. The creature follows a command until the task is completed and obeys only the summoner. However, it resents protracted missions or complex tasks and seeks to interpret its instructions accordingly.

Invisible stalkers have an amorphous form. A see invisibility spell shows only a dim outline of a cloud, while a true seeing spell reveals a rolling cloud of vapor.

These creatures speak only Auran but can understand Common.

description_html: This humanoid is about the size of a gnome or halfling. It has a scaly hide, a naked tail like that of a rat, and a doglike head with two small horns.
description_text: This humanoid is about the size of a gnome or halfling. It has a scaly hide, a naked tail like that of a rat, and a doglike head with two small horns.

name: Kraken
full_attack: 2 tentacles +28 melee (2d8+12/19-20) and 6 arms +23 melee (1d6+6) and bite +23 melee (4d6+6)
description_html: This creature resembles an immense squid, with a streamlined body, two staring eyes, and a mass of tentacles. Its body is approximately 30 feet long and protected by layers of thick muscle.
description_text: This creature resembles an immense squid, with a streamlined body, two staring eyes, and a mass of tentacles. Its body is approximately 30 feet long and protected by layers of thick muscle.

name: Krenshar
description_html: This creature seems to combine the worst features of a wolf and a hyena. It has a shaggy, spotted coat, a bristling mane along its spine, and a long, bushy tail.
description_text: This creature seems to combine the worst features of a wolf and a hyena. It has a shaggy, spotted coat, a bristling mane along its spine, and a long, bushy tail.

name: Kuo-Toa
organization: Patrol (2–4 plus 1 3rd−level whip), squad (6–11 plus 1 or 2 3rd−level whips, 1 or 2 4th−level monitors, and 1 8th−level fighter), band (20–50 plus 100 noncombatants plus 2 3rd−level whips, 2 8th−level fighters, and 1 10th−level fighter), or tribe (40–400 plus 1 3rd−level whip per 20 adults, 1 4th−level monitor, 4 8th−level fighters, 1 10th−level whip, and 2 10th−level fighters)
description_html: This humanoid is a little shorter than a human. Its rounded body is covered with fine scales, giving it the appearance of being pudgy or bloated. The arms and legs are slender, almost willowy, ending in broad hands and distended feet that look much like flippers. Its fishlike, bullet-shaped head has bulging, silver-black eyes and a wide mouth full of sharp teeth.

description_html: This foul creature appears more or less humanoid, but has mottled, decaying flesh drawn tight across clearly visible bones. It is mostly hairless and has a carnivore’s sharp teeth. Its eyes burn like hot coals in their sunken sockets.

name: Lion
description_html: The statistics presented here describe a male African lion, which is 5 to 8 feet long and weighs 330 to 550 pounds. Females are slightly smaller but use the same statistics.
description_text: The statistics presented here describe a male African lion, which is 5 to 8 feet long and weighs 330 to 550 pounds. Females are slightly smaller but use the same statistics.

name: Lion, Celestial
description_html:
Celestial creatures dwell on the upper planes, the realms of good, although they resemble beings found on the Material Plane. They are more regal and more beautiful than their earthly counterparts.

Celestial creatures often come in metallic colors (usually silver, gold, or platinum). They can be mistaken for half-celestials, more powerful creatures that are created when a celestial mates with a noncelestial creature.

These celestial creatures are commonly summoned by a summon monster IV spell.
description_text:

These celestial creatures are commonly summoned by a
summon monster IV
spell.

treasure: Standard coins; standard goods (nonflammables only); standard items (nonflammables only)
description_html: This glowing, humanoid creature looks like a stumpy human sculpted from fire and flowing lava. It radiates heat like a small bonfire, and it has a gleeful, almost malicious smile on its face.
description_text: This glowing, humanoid creature looks like a stumpy human sculpted from fire and flowing lava. It radiates heat like a small bonfire, and it has a gleeful, almost malicious smile on its face.

name: Manta Ray
description_html: These fish are nonaggressive and generally avoid contact with other creatures. They filter plankton and similar small organisms from the water through their gaping, toothless maws.
description_text: These fish are nonaggressive and generally avoid contact with other creatures. They filter plankton and similar small organisms from the water through their gaping, toothless maws.

name: Manticore
full_attack: 2 claws +10 melee (2d4+5) and bite +8 melee (1d8+2) or 6 spikes +8 ranged (1d8+2/19-20)
description_html: This creature is a monster in every sense of the word. It has the head of a vaguely humanoid beast, the body of a lion, and the wings of a dragon. The creature’s back is set with curved barbs, and its long tail ends in a cluster of deadly spikes.
description_text: This creature is a monster in every sense of the word. It has the head of a vaguely humanoid beast, the body of a lion, and the wings of a dragon. The creature’s back is set with curved barbs, and its long tail ends in a cluster of deadly spikes.

organization: Solitary (1), gang (2–4 mephits of mixed types), or mob (5–12 mephits of mixed types)
description_html: This winged creature looks like a short, gaunt human with gray, flaky skin and a sorrowful expression.
description_text: This winged creature looks like a short, gaunt human with gray, flaky skin and a sorrowful expression.

name: Mephit, Earth
organization: Solitary (1), gang (2–4 mephits of mixed types), or mob (5–12 mephits of mixed types)
description_html: This winged creature looks like a stony, rugged, mostly hairless dwarf.

organization: Solitary (1), gang (2–4 mephits of mixed types), or mob (5–12 mephits of mixed types)

description_text: This winged creature looks like a miniature devil, wreathed in flame and cackling with mischief.

organization: Solitary (1), gang (2–4 mephits of mixed types), or mob (5–12 mephits of mixed types)

description_html: This winged creature looks like a brutish, miniature human made of molten stone and glowing lava.
description_text: This winged creature looks like a brutish, miniature human made of molten stone and glowing lava.

organization: Solitary (1), gang (2–4 mephits of mixed types), or mob (5–12 mephits of mixed types)
description_html: This loathsome, winged creature looks like a miniature human composed of muck and filth. The creature has a terribly offensive odor, and slime dribbles from its body.
description_text: This loathsome, winged creature looks like a miniature human composed of muck and filth. The creature has a terribly offensive odor, and slime dribbles from its body.

description_html: This winged creature looks like a miniature human with bleary red eyes and crystalline flesh.
description_text: This winged creature looks like a miniature human with bleary red eyes and crystalline flesh.

description_html: This winged creature looks like a miniature human with pale skin and wisps of vapor rising from its nose, mouth, and ears. It sheds drops of steaming water when it moves.
description_text: This winged creature looks like a miniature human with pale skin and wisps of vapor rising from its nose, mouth, and ears. It sheds drops of steaming water when it moves.

name: Monkey, Celestial
description_html:
The statistics presented here can describe any arboreal monkey that is no bigger than a housecat, such as a colobus or capuchin.

Celestial creatures dwell on the upper planes, the realms of good, although they resemble beings found on the Material Plane. They are more regal and more beautiful than their earthly counterparts.

Celestial creatures often come in metallic colors (usually silver, gold, or platinum). They can be mistaken for half-celestials, more powerful creatures that are created when a celestial mates with a noncelestial creature.

These celestial creatures are commonly summoned by the summon monster I spell.

name: Monstrous Spider, Colossal
description_html:
All monstrous spiders are aggressive predators that use their poisonous bites to subdue or kill prey.

Monstrous spiders come in two general types: hunters and web-spinners. Hunters rove about, while web-spinners usually attempt to trap prey. Hunting spiders can spin webs to use as lairs, but cannot use their webs as weapons the way web-spinners can. A hunting spider has a base land speed 10 feet faster than the figures given in the statistics blocks.

name: Mule
description_html:
Mules are sterile crossbreeds of donkeys and horses. A mule is similar to a light horse, but slightly stronger and more agile.

Carrying Capacity: A light load for a mule is up to 230 pounds; a medium load, 231–460 pounds; and a heavy load, 461–690 pounds. A mule can drag 3,450 pounds.

name: Naga, Dark
full_attack: Sting +7 melee (2d4+2 plus poison) and bite +2 melee (1d4+1)
description_html: This snakelike creature has a deep purple body covered in fine scales, making it look rather like a great eel. Its tail ends in a barbed stinger. Its head resembles an eel’s but has a humanlike visage.
description_text: This snakelike creature has a deep purple body covered in fine scales, making it look rather like a great eel. Its tail ends in a barbed stinger. Its head resembles an eel’s but has a humanlike visage.

name: Naga, Guardian
attack: Bite +12 melee (2d6+7 plus poison) or spit +9 ranged touch (poison)
full_attack: Bite +12 melee (2d6+7 plus poison) or spit +9 ranged touch (poison)
description_html: This beautiful creature looks like a snake with a human face and green-gold scales. A golden frill runs from the top of its head to the tip of its tail. The sweet scent of flowers accompanies the creature.
description_text: This beautiful creature looks like a snake with a human face and green-gold scales. A golden frill runs from the top of its head to the tip of its tail. The sweet scent of flowers accompanies the creature.

name: Naga, Spirit
description_html: This loathsome serpent has a black body banded in swaths of bright crimson. Its head is vaguely human, with stringy hair. The odor of carrion hangs heavy in the air about it.
description_text: This loathsome serpent has a black body banded in swaths of bright crimson. Its head is vaguely human, with stringy hair. The odor of carrion hangs heavy in the air about it.

name: Naga, Water
description_html: This beautiful creature looks like a snake with a faintly human head and reticulated emerald-green patterns running the length of its body. Fiery red and orange spines jut from its backbone.
description_text: This beautiful creature looks like a snake with a faintly human head and reticulated emerald-green patterns running the length of its body. Fiery red and orange spines jut from its backbone.

name: Nightmare
full_attack: 2 hooves +9 melee (1d8+4 plus 1d4 fire) and bite +4 melee (1d8+2)
description_html: At first glance, this creature looks like a large, powerful horse with a jet-black coat. A closer look, however, reveals its true nature. Flames wreathe its steely hooves, trail from its flared nostrils, and smolder in the depths of its dark eyes.
description_text: At first glance, this creature looks like a large, powerful horse with a jet-black coat. A closer look, however, reveals its true nature. Flames wreathe its steely hooves, trail from its flared nostrils, and smolder in the depths of its dark eyes.

name: Nightmare, Cauchemar
full_attack: 2 hooves +23 melee (2d6+10 plus 1d4 fire) and bite +18 melee (2d6+5)
description_html: At first glance, this creature looks like a large, powerful horse with a jet-black coat. A closer look, however, reveals its true nature. Flames wreathe its steely hooves, trail from its flared nostrils, and smolder in the depths of its dark eyes.

name: Nightshade, Nightcrawler
full_attack: Bite +29 melee (4d6+21/19-20) and sting +24 melee (2d8+11/19-20 plus poison)
description_html: This creature looks like an immense worm covered with plates of dead black, chitinous armor. Its toothy maw is wider than a human is tall, and its teeth and gullet are black, too.
description_text: This creature looks like an immense worm covered with plates of dead black, chitinous armor. Its toothy maw is wider than a human is tall, and its teeth and gullet are black, too.

name: Nightshade, Nightwalker
description_html: The creature looks like a humanoid giant, taller than a house and composed of pure darkness. It wears no clothing and has smooth, hairless skin and a genderless body.
description_text: The creature looks like a humanoid giant, taller than a house and composed of pure darkness. It wears no clothing and has smooth, hairless skin and a genderless body.

name: Nightshade, Nightwing
description_html: The creature seems to be nothing but a mass of utter darkness shaped like a monstrous bat.
description_text: The creature seems to be nothing but a mass of utter darkness shaped like a monstrous bat.

name: Nymph
description_html: This being’s beauty exceeds mere words; she is captivating and dangerous because of the emotions she inspires. She has long, copper hair, perfect skin, large eyes, and long, swept-back ears.
description_text: This being’s beauty exceeds mere words; she is captivating and dangerous because of the emotions she inspires. She has long, copper hair, perfect skin, large eyes, and long, swept-back ears.

name: Ochre Jelly
description_html: This creature resembles a giant, dark yellow amoeba.
description_text: This creature resembles a giant, dark yellow amoeba.

name: Octopus
description_html: These bottom-dwelling sea creatures are dangerous only to their prey. If disturbed, they usually try to escape.
description_text: These bottom-dwelling sea creatures are dangerous only to their prey. If disturbed, they usually try to escape.

name: Octopus, Giant
description_html: These creatures are aggressive and territorial hunters, with arms reaching 10 feet or more in length. Their tentacles are studded with barbs and sharp-edged suckers.
description_text: These creatures are aggressive and territorial hunters, with arms reaching 10 feet or more in length. Their tentacles are studded with barbs and sharp-edged suckers.

name: Ogre
speed: Land 30 ft, in hide armor; base 40 ft.

description_text: This hulking brute appears to be at least 9 feet tall. It has a thick hide covered in dark, warty bumps, it wears smelly skins, and its hair is long, unkempt, and greasy.

name: Otyugh
description_html: This creature looks like a bloated ovoid covered with a rocklike skin. A vine-like stalk about 2 feet long rises from the top of the disgusting body and bears the two eyes. Its mouth—little more than a wide gash filled with razor-sharp teeth—is in the center of the mass. The creature shuffles about on three thick, sturdy legs and has two long tentacles covered in rough, thorny protrusions. The tentacles end in leaflike appendages covered in more thorny growths.

name: Owl, Celestial
description_html:
The statistics presented here describe nocturnal birds of prey from 1 to 2 feet long, with wingspans up to 6 feet. They combine both talons into a single attack.

Celestial creatures dwell on the upper planes, the realms of good, although they resemble beings found on the Material Plane. They are more regal and more beautiful than their earthly counterparts.

Celestial creatures often come in metallic colors (usually silver, gold, or platinum). They can be mistaken for half-celestials, more powerful creatures that are created when a celestial mates with a noncelestial creature.

These celestial creatures are commonly summoned by the summon monster I spell.

name: Owl, Giant
description_html:
Giant owls are nocturnal birds of prey, feared for their ability to hunt and attack in near silence. They are intelligent, and though naturally suspicious, sometimes associate with good creatures.

They attack creatures that appear threatening, especially those intent on raiding the owls’ nest for eggs or fledglings, which fetch a handsome price in many civilized areas. Young owls can be trained and are prized as aerial mounts.

A typical giant owl stands about 9 feet tall, has a wingspan of up to 20 feet, and resembles its smaller cousins in nearly every way except size.

Giant owls speak Common and Sylvan.

Training a Giant Owl

Although intelligent, a giant owl requires training before it can bear a rider in combat. To be trained, a giant owl must have a friendly attitude toward the trainer (this can be achieved through a successful Diplomacy check). Training a friendly giant owl requires six weeks of work and a DC 25 Handle Animal check. Riding a giant owl requires an exotic saddle. A giant owl can fight while carrying a rider, but the rider cannot also attack unless he or she succeeds on a Ride check.

Giant owl eggs are worth 2,500 gp apiece on the open market, while chicks are worth 4,000 gp each. Professional trainers charge 1,000 gp to rear or train a giant owl.

Carrying Capacity: A light load for a giant owl is up to 300 pounds; a medium load, 301–600 pounds; and a heavy load, 601–900 pounds.

name: Pony
description_html:
The statistics presented here describe a small horse, under 5 feet tall at the shoulder. Ponies are otherwise similar to light horses and cannot fight while carrying a rider.

name: Rhinoceros
description_html:
The rhinoceros is infamous for its bad temper and willingness to charge intruders.

The statistics presented here are based on the African black rhino, which is 6 to 14 feet long, 3 to 6 feet high at the shoulder, and weighs up to 6,000 pounds. These statistics can describe any herbivore of similar size and similar natural weapons (antlers, horns, tusks, or the like).

name: Rust Monster

description_html: This creature seems to be about the size of a pony. It has four insectlike legs and a squat, humped body protected by a thick, lumpy hide. Its tail is covered with armor plates and ends in a bony projection that looks like a double-ended paddle. The creature sports two long antennae on its head, one beneath each eye.

full_attack: Trident +4 melee (1d8+3) and bite +2 melee (1d4+1); or 2 talons +4 melee (1d4+2) and bite +2 melee (1d4+1); or heavy crossbow +3 ranged (1d10/19-20)
organization: Solitary, pair, team (5–8), patrol (11–20 plus 1 3rd−level lieutenant and 1–2 sharks), band (20–80 plus 100% noncombatants plus 1 3rd−level lieutenant and 1 4th−level chieftain per 20 adults plus 1–2 sharks), or tribe (70–160 plus 100% noncombatants plus 1 3rd−level lieutenant per 20 adults, 1 4th−level chieftain per 40 adults, 9 4th−level guards, 1–4 underpriestesses of 3rd–6th level, 1 7th−level priestess, and 1 baron of 6th–8th level plus 5–8 sharks)
description_html: This humanoid has scaly skin with webbed fingers and toes, and sharp fangs fill its mouth. It has a long tail ending in a curved fin, and it has fins on its arms, back, and head. Its great, staring eyes are deep black.
description_text: This humanoid has scaly skin with webbed fingers and toes, and sharp fangs fill its mouth. It has a long tail ending in a curved fin, and it has fins on its arms, back, and head. Its great, staring eyes are deep black.

speed: 30 ft, 30 ft. (20 ft. in full plate armor)

name: Shambling Mound
description_html: This creature looks like a mass of leaves and vines with a generally human-like form. It has a barrel-shaped body with ropy arms and stumpy legs. It doesn’t seem to have a head.
description_text: This creature looks like a mass of leaves and vines with a generally human-like form. It has a barrel-shaped body with ropy arms and stumpy legs. It doesn’t seem to have a head.

name: Shark, Dire
description_html: This enormous sea monster has a streamlined body with a triangular fin atop its back, a toothy mouth set well under its long snout, and a symmetrical tail shaped like a crescent moon.
description_text: This enormous sea monster has a streamlined body with a triangular fin atop its back, a toothy mouth set well under its long snout, and a symmetrical tail shaped like a crescent moon.

name: Shark, Huge
description_html: Huge sharks are true monsters, like great whites, that can exceed 20 feet in length.
description_text: Huge sharks are true monsters, like great whites, that can exceed 20 feet in length.

name: Shark, Large
description_html: Large sharks can reach around 15 feet in length and are a serious threat.
description_text: Large sharks can reach around 15 feet in length and are a serious threat.

name: Shark, Medium
description_html: Smaller sharks are from 5 to 8 feet long and not usually dangerous to creatures other than their prey.
description_text: Smaller sharks are from 5 to 8 feet long and not usually dangerous to creatures other than their prey.

name: Shield Guardian
description_html: This massive conglomeration of stone, wood, and metal is the size of an ogre and resembles a giant stick figure with stony appendages.
description_text: This massive conglomeration of stone, wood, and metal is the size of an ogre and resembles a giant stick figure with stony appendages.

name: Shocker Lizard
description_html: This little lizard is about the size of a terrier. It has a bullet-shaped head sporting a large pair of horns that sweep back from the sides like spiky ears. A similar structure appears on the tip of the tail.
description_text: This little lizard is about the size of a terrier. It has a bullet-shaped head sporting a large pair of horns that sweep back from the sides like spiky ears. A similar structure appears on the tip of the tail.

name: Silver Dragon, Adult
full_attack: Bite +28 melee (2d8+8), 2 Claws +23 melee (2d6+4), 2 Wings +23 melee (1d8+4), Tail Slap +23 melee (2d6+12)
organization: solitary, pair, or family (1−2 and 2−5 offspring)
description_html: A smooth, shiny plate forms the dragon’s face. It has a frill that rises high over its head and continues down the neck and back to the tip of the tail. Long spines with dark tips support the frill. It has two smooth, shiny horns, and wings that are wide and sleek. The dragon has the scent of rain, and its scales gleam like liquid metal.
