name: Skum
description_html: This creature looks like an abominable crossbreed of human and fish. Its fins have grown into twisted arms and legs, and its bent back is crowned with a long, spiny frill. It has a slender, muscular tail and bulbous eyes.
description_text: This creature looks like an abominable crossbreed of human and fish. Its fins have grown into twisted arms and legs, and its bent back is crowned with a long, spiny frill. It has a slender, muscular tail and bulbous eyes.

name: Slaad, Blue
full_attack: 4 claws +13 melee (2d6+6) and bite +11 melee (2d8+3 plus disease)
description_html: This bulking creature looks like a strapping blue-skinned humanoid toad, as big as an ogre, with almost no neck and a massive, flat head. It is bipedal, with clawed hands and feet. It has wicked-looking, bony hooks on the backs of its hands.
description_text: This bulking creature looks like a strapping blue-skinned humanoid toad, as big as an ogre, with almost no neck and a massive, flat head. It is bipedal, with clawed hands and feet. It has wicked-looking, bony hooks on the backs of its hands.

name: Slaad, Death
full_attack: 2 claws +20 melee (3d6+5 plus stun) and bite +18 melee (2d10+2)
description_html: Lean and quick-looking, this humanoid resembles a two-legged frog. Its skin is a dappled gray color, and its fingers are long and clawed. It stands as tall as a human.
description_text: Lean and quick-looking, this humanoid resembles a two-legged frog. Its skin is a dappled gray color, and its fingers are long and clawed. It stands as tall as a human.

name: Slaad, Gray
description_html: Lean and quick-looking, this humanoid resembles a two-legged frog. Its skin is a dappled gray color, and its fingers are long and clawed. It stands as tall as a human.
description_text: Lean and quick-looking, this humanoid resembles a two-legged frog. Its skin is a dappled gray color, and its fingers are long and clawed. It stands as tall as a human.

name: Slaad, Green
description_html: This tall, gangly creature looks like a cross between an ogre and a frog. Its skin is a motiled green, and it has long, sharp claws and a wide mouth.
description_text: This tall, gangly creature looks like a cross between an ogre and a frog. Its skin is a motiled green, and it has long, sharp claws and a wide mouth.

name: Slaad, Red
full_attack: Bite +11 melee (2d8+5) and 2 claws +9 melee (1d4+2 plus implant)
description_html: This creature looks like a roughly humanoid, red-skinned toad with almost no neck and a massive, flat head. It is bipedal, with clawed hands and feet. The hands and the digits on them are particularly large. A human would stand only about as high as the creature’s shoulders.
description_text: This creature looks like a roughly humanoid, red-skinned toad with almost no neck and a massive, flat head. It is bipedal, with clawed hands and feet. The hands and the digits on them are particularly large. A human would stand only about as high as the creature’s shoulders.

name: Snake, Constrictor
description_html: Constructor snakes usually are not aggressive and flee when confronted. They hunt for food but do not attempt to make a meal out of any creature that is too large to constrict.
description_text: Constructor snakes usually are not aggressive and flee when confronted. They hunt for food but do not attempt to make a meal out of any creature that is too large to constrict.

name: Snake, Giant Constrictor
description_html: Giant constrictor snakes are more aggressive than their smaller cousins, principally because they need a great amount of food to survive.
description_text: Giant constrictor snakes are more aggressive than their smaller cousins, principally because they need a great amount of food to survive.

description_html: These creatures range widely in size. They are not particularly aggressive, but will often lash out with a bite attack before attempting to retreat.

description_html: This being looks like a human, but it has a faintly disturbing demeanor about it and a wicked gleam in its eyes. Short horns sprout from its forehead.

name: Tiger
description_html: These great cats stand more than 3 feet tall at the shoulder and are about 9 feet long. They weigh from 400 to 600 pounds.

name: Tojanida, Adult
description_html: This creature resembles a snapping turtle. It has a spindle-shaped shell made up of hexagonal plates and a narrow head with jaws that open horizontally rather than vertically. A seemingly random array of crablike claws and paddles sprout from openings at both ends of the creature’s shell.

name: Treant
description_html: This tall being looks much like an animated tree. Its skin is thick and brown, with a barklike texture. Its arms are gnarled like branches, and its legs look like the split trunk of a tree. Above the eyes and along the head are dozens of smaller branches from which hang great leaves.

description_html: This reptilian creature looks somewhat humanoid. It is a little shorter than a human. It has spindly but muscular arms and walks erect on its squat legs, trailing a long, slender tail. Its head is lizardlike and crowned with a frill that extends from the forehead to the base of the neck. Its eyes are black and beady.

name: Troll
description_html: This big, bipedal creature is about one and a half times as tall as a human but very thin. It has long and ungainly arms and legs. The legs end in great three-toed feet, the arms in wide, powerful hands with sharpened claws. The hide is rubbery, and its hair is thick and ropy, and seems to writhe with its own energy.

name: Umber Hulk
description_html: This hulking, powerfully built creature looks something like a cross between a great ape and a beetle. The low, rounded head is dominated by a massive pair of mandibles and rows of triangular teeth. It has two big compound eyes like a beetle’s, with two smaller eyes like an ape’s in between. Armor plates cover virtually all of its chitinous body, whose scattered feelers resemble sparse hair.

name: Violet Fungus
organization: Solitary, patch (2–4), or mixed patch (2–4 violet fungi and 3–5 shriekers)
description_html: This human-sized mushroom has four tendrillike tentacles and a mass of small, rootlike feelers at its base that enable it to move slowly.
description_text: This human-sized mushroom has four tendrillike tentacles and a mass of small, rootlike feelers at its base that enable it to move slowly.

name: Warhorse, Heavy
description_html:
Horses are widely domesticated for riding and as beasts of burden.

These animals are similar to heavy horses but are trained and bred for strength and aggression.

Carrying Capacity: A light load for a heavy warhorse is up to 300 pounds; a medium load, 301–600 pounds; and a heavy load, 601–900 pounds. A heavy warhorse can drag 4,500 pounds.
description_text:
Horses are widely domesticated for riding and as beasts of burden.
These animals are similar to heavy horses but are trained and bred for strength and aggression.
Carrying Capacity:
A light load for a heavy warhorse is up to 300 pounds; a medium load, 301–600 pounds; and a heavy load, 601–900 pounds. A heavy warhorse can drag 4,500 pounds.

name: Warhorse, Light
description_html:
Horses are widely domesticated for riding and as beasts of burden.

These animals or similar to light horses but are trained and bred for strength and aggression. They usually are not ready for warfare before age three.

Carrying Capacity: A light load for a light warhorse is up to 230 pounds; a medium load, 231–460 pounds; and a heavy load, 461–690 pounds. A light warhorse can drag 3,450 pounds.

name: Water Elemental, Elder
description_html: A vortex of water rolls across the ground, though it never seems to crash or lose its shape. The waves cascade and storm around a central, humanoid-shaped whirlpool, with watery appendages that pound with the force of an ocean storm.

name: Weasel
description_html: These little mammals are aggressive predators but usually confine themselves to smaller prey. The statistics presented here can also apply to ferrets.
description_text: These little mammals are aggressive predators but usually confine themselves to smaller prey. The statistics presented here can also apply to ferrets.

name: Weasel, Dire
description_html: This sleek, fur-covered creature has a body longer than a human is tall. It has a wedged-shaped head crowned in short horns, four short legs, and a stumpy tail. It movements are fluid and very quick.
description_text: This sleek, fur-covered creature has a body longer than a human is tall. It has a wedged-shaped head crowned in short horns, four short legs, and a stumpy tail. It movements are fluid and very quick.

name: Whale, Baleen
description_html:
Some varieties of these seagoing mammals are among the largest animals known. Relatively small whales can be vicious predators, attacking virtually anything they detect.

The statistics here describe a plankton-feeding whale between 30 and 60 feet long, such as gray, humpback, and right whales.

These massive creatures are surprisingly gentle. If harassed or provoked, they are as likely to flee as they are to retaliate.
description_text:

These massive creatures are surprisingly gentle. If harassed or provoked, they are as likely to flee as they are to retaliate.

name: Whale, Cachalot
full_attack: Bite +17 melee (4d6+12) and tail slap +12 melee (1d8+6)
description_html:
Some varieties of these seagoing mammals are among the largest animals known. Relatively small whales can be vicious predators, attacking virtually anything they detect.

Also known as sperm whales, these creatures can be up to 60 feet long. They prey on giant squids.
description_text:

name: Whale, Orca
description_html:
Some varieties of these seagoing mammals are among the largest animals known. Relatively small whales (such as the orca presented here) can be vicious predators, attacking virtually anything they detect.

These ferocious creatures are about 30 feet long. They eat fish, squid, seals, and other whales.

name: Wight
description_html: This creature resembles a human corpse. Its wild, frantic eyes burn with malevolence. The leathery, desiccated flesh is drawn tight across its bones, and the teeth have grown into sharp, jagged needles.
description_text: This creature resembles a human corpse. Its wild, frantic eyes burn with malevolence. The leathery, desiccated flesh is drawn tight across its bones, and the teeth have grown into sharp, jagged needles.

name: Will-o'-Wisp
description_html: This creature seems to be nothing but a faintly glowing sphere of light.
description_text: This creature seems to be nothing but a faintly glowing sphere of light.

name: Winter Wolf
description_html: This creature looks like a white wolf with icy blue eyes. It stands as tall as a horse, and its breath smokes with cold.

name: Wolf
description_html: Wolves are pack hunters known for their persistence and cunning.
description_text: Wolves are pack hunters known for their persistence and cunning.

name: Wolf, Dire
description_html: This immense gray wolf seems as big as a horse. It has fiery eyes and a thick coat of fur.

name: Wolverine
description_html: These creatures are similar to badgers but are bigger, stronger, and even more ferocious.

name: Wolverine, Dire
description_html: This massive, low-slung creature has a wedge-shaped head and body covered in coarse, shaggy fur. Its legs are short and thick, and it has claws like pickaxes on its feet.

description_html: This quasi-reptilian creature has four arms, bright red scales, and dark, penetrating eyes. It is not quite as tall as a human.

name: Xorn, Average
description_html: This bizarre creature has a wide body made of a pebbly, stonelike material. It has a large, powerful mouth on top of its head, with three long arms, tipped with sharp talons, symmetrically positioned around it. Between the arms are large, stone-lidded eyes that see in all directions. At its base are three thick, short legs, each directly beneath an eye.

Zombie Young Adult White Dragon* (CR 5)

Large Undead
Alignment: Always neutral
Initiative: +4; Senses: blindsense 60 ft., darkvision 120 ft., and keen senses

AC: 15 (-1 size, -1 Dex, +7 natural), touch 8, flat-footed 15
Hit Dice: 15d12+33 (130 hp); DR: 5/slashing
Fort +9, Ref +8, Will +9
Speed: 60 ft., burrow 30 ft., fly 200 ft. (clumsy), swim 60 ft.
Space: 10 ft./5 ft. (10 ft. with bite)

Full Attack: Bite +18 melee and 2 claws +13 melee and 2 wings +13 melee
Damage: Bite 2d6+4, claws 1d8+2, wings 1d6+2
Special Attacks/Actions: Breath weapon, frightful presence
Abilities: Str 19, Dex 8, Con -, Int -, Wis 11, Cha 2
Special Qualities: icewalking, immunity to cold, keen senses, slow, SR 16, undead traits
Feats: Toughness
Skills: Swim +4
Advancement: Up to +2 HD
Climate/Terrain: Cold mountains
Organization: Any
Treasure/Possessions: None

name: Zombie, Bugbear
attack: Morningstar +6 melee (1d8+3) or slam +6 melee (1d6+3) or javelin +3 ranged (1d6+2)
full_attack: Morningstar +6 melee (1d8+3) or slam +6 melee (1d6+3) or javelin +3 ranged (1d6+2)
description_html:
Zombies are corpses reanimated through dark and sinister magic. These mindless automatons shamble about, doing their creator’s bidding without fear or hesitation.

Zombies are not pleasant to look upon. Drawn from their graves, half decayed and partially consumed by worms, they wear the tattered remains of their burial clothes. A rank odor of death hangs heavy in the air around them. Because of their utter lack of intelligence, the instructions given to a newly created zombie must be very simple, such as “Kill anyone who enters this room.”
